# busbar Provider

Manage a busbar LLM gateway through its admin API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    busbar = {
      source = "GetBusbar/busbar"
    }
  }
}

# Point at the gateway's admin listener. The token is the operator admin token,
# sent as the x-admin-token header. Both may also come from the BUSBAR_ENDPOINT
# and BUSBAR_ADMIN_TOKEN environment variables.
provider "busbar" {
  endpoint = "https://busbar-admin.internal:8081"
  token    = var.busbar_admin_token
}

variable "busbar_admin_token" {
  type      = string
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `ca_cert_pem` (String) PEM-encoded CA certificate to trust the admin server's certificate (e.g. a private CA).
- `client_cert_pem` (String) PEM-encoded client certificate for mTLS against a cert-gated admin plane.
- `client_key_pem` (String, Sensitive) PEM-encoded private key for client_cert_pem.
- `endpoint` (String) Admin listener URL, e.g. https://busbar-admin.internal:8081. May also be set with the BUSBAR_ENDPOINT environment variable.
- `insecure` (Boolean) Skip TLS certificate verification. Development only; never use against production.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) Operator admin token, sent as the x-admin-token header. May also be set with the BUSBAR_ADMIN_TOKEN environment variable.
